Our Rooms & Pavilions

Renovated for your utmost comfort, combining tranquility, privacy, and elegance.

Surface Area: 16 to 25 m²

Garden Side Room

These pleasant rooms allow you to fully enjoy the garden with their private terraces.

Available in Double, Triple, and Family options, they feature a cozy private terrace opening onto our green sanctuary.

1 to 4 guests
Queen Size bed or twin beds
16 to 25 m²

Included Amenities

  • Free Wi-Fi
  • Courtesy Tray
  • Hairdryer
  • Complimentary Toiletries
Book this room
Surface Area: 16 to 31 m²

Sea View Room

Spacious and welcoming, these rooms offer breathtaking panoramic views of the bay of Villefranche-sur-Mer and Cap Ferrat.

Available in Double, Triple, or Quadruple configurations. Wake up facing the deep blue Mediterranean.

1 to 4 guests
King Size or Queen Size bed
16 to 31 m²

Included Amenities

  • Free Wi-Fi
  • Courtesy Tray
  • Hairdryer
  • Complimentary Toiletries
Book this room
Surface Area: 20 or 26 m²

Our Private Pavilions

Separated from the main building, our two private pavilions offer a unique space of freedom and well-being.

The Pavillon de la Fiancée is perfect for couples seeking romance. The Pavillon du Pirate is ideal for families thanks to its prime location.

2 or 4 guests
Queen Size or King Size bed
20 or 26 m²

Included Amenities

  • Free Wi-Fi
  • Courtesy Tray
  • Hairdryer
  • Complimentary Toiletries
Book this room

Any questions about our room amenities?

Contact us

La Fiancée du Pirate, an intimate 15-room boutique hotel nestled on the heights of Villefranche-sur-Mer, between Nice and Monaco.

TripAdvisor Rated Excellent on TripAdvisor
